calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Continued To Feb-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Richard Paris, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Barbara Reitz, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Rebekah Wu.
Default was entered against defendant on September 18, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Barbara Reitz, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rebekah Wu as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,000.00.
Punitive Damages - $5,000.00.
Costs - $443.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $21,443.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Jan-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Continued To Nov-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
